description: Product Description Ample room for free turn around Large Cat Litter Tray The high back cat litter tray measures in 60L x 40W x 16H CM. Large litter trays is designed to accommodate cats of all sizes, from kittens to fully grown big cats. This large cat litter pan provides ample space for multi-cats, ensuring every feline has room to move comfortably. High Side with Low Entrance The 10CM low entry is ideal for kittens and older cats , while the 16CM high walls contain litter and minimize mess, providing privacy and reducing spillage. High Sides for Urine and Litter Control Square shape fits conveniently into corners. High-back design helps contain litter scatter and cat spray. Effectively Collect Litter Carried by Paws The filtering pedal helps to recycle cat litter hidden in claws. This cat litter pan makes it perfect for kitten, senior cats, and cats with limited mobility. Whether you're caring for a playful kitty or an elderly cat, it provides easy access, ensuring your cat use it comfortably and independently. Roomy Space Offer Cats to Comfortably Move Around The large interior space provides cats with an entire oversized litter bed, allowing them to fully unleash their nature. The long side of the rectangular cat litter box measuring 40CM * 60CM ensures that cats will not feel embarrassed no matter which angle they enter from. Fully Disassemblable for Thorough Cleaning Quick rinsing with water (simple maintenance), Rounded safety edges - No sharp corners. Seamless construction with smooth surface (long-lasting durability tested). Sturdy and non-sticky, leaving no lingering odors behind. XL Cat Litter Tray for Big Cats Measures: 60 CM L, 40CM W, and 16CM H, the large litter tray has low entry for big cat & multiple cats, kittens, and senior cats. The large litter box with wide litter bed to hold approximately 20 pounds of cat litter, which means adding litter once will last 30 days for 1 cat or 15 days for 2 cats!
